pipelines.name: Video_Captioning_RTSP_Software
pipelines.pipeline: rtspsrc location={source[uri]} protocols=tcp latency=100 name=source ! rtph264depay wait-for-keyframe=true ! h264parse ! avdec_h264 ! videoconvert ! video/x-raw,format=BGRA ! tee name=split allow-not-linked=true split. ! queue leaky=downstream max-size-buffers={parameters[queue_size]} ! videorate drop-only=true ! video/x-raw,format=BGRA,framerate={parameters[frame_rate]}/1 ! videoscale ! video/x-raw,format=BGRA,width=[1,{parameters[frame_width]}],height=[1,{parameters[frame_height]}] ! gvagenai name=captioner generation-config="max_new_tokens={parameters[captioner_max_new_tokens]},num_beams=1,do_sample=false,temperature=0.1,repetition_penalty=1.1" frame-rate={parameters[frame_rate]} metrics=true ! gvametaconvert add-empty-results=true name=metaconvert ! gvapython class=MQTTPublisher function=process module=/home/pipeline-server/gvapython/mqtt_publisher/mqtt_publisher.py name=mqtt_publisher ! fakesink sync=false async=false split. ! queue leaky=downstream max-size-buffers=1 ! appsink name=appsink sync=false

pipelines.name: Video_Captioning_RTSP_Hardware
pipelines.pipeline: rtspsrc location={source[uri]} protocols=tcp latency=100 name=source ! rtph264depay wait-for-keyframe=true ! h264parse ! vah264dec ! vapostproc ! tee name=split allow-not-linked=true split. ! queue leaky=downstream max-size-buffers={parameters[queue_size]} ! videorate drop-only=true ! video/x-raw(memory:VAMemory),framerate={parameters[frame_rate]}/1 ! vapostproc ! video/x-raw,format=BGRA,width=[1,{parameters[frame_width]}],height=[1,{parameters[frame_height]}] ! gvagenai name=captioner generation-config="max_new_tokens={parameters[captioner_max_new_tokens]},num_beams=1,do_sample=false,temperature=0.1,repetition_penalty=1.1" model-cache-path="/tmp/ov_cache" frame-rate={parameters[frame_rate]} metrics=true ! gvametaconvert add-empty-results=true name=metaconvert ! gvapython class=MQTTPublisher function=process module=/home/pipeline-server/gvapython/mqtt_publisher/mqtt_publisher.py name=mqtt_publisher ! fakesink sync=false async=false split. ! queue leaky=downstream max-size-buffers=1 ! vapostproc ! video/x-raw,format=BGRA ! appsink name=appsink sync=false

pipelines.name: Video_Captioning_RTSP_Detection_Software
pipelines.pipeline: rtspsrc location={source[uri]} protocols=tcp latency=100 name=source ! rtph264depay wait-for-keyframe=true ! h264parse ! avdec_h264 ! videoconvert ! video/x-raw,format=BGRA ! gvadetect name=detection device={parameters[detection_device]} model="/home/pipeline-server/detection_models/{parameters[detection_model_name]}/public/{parameters[detection_model_name]}/FP32/{parameters[detection_model_name]}.xml" threshold={parameters[detection_threshold]} pre-process-backend={parameters[detection_pre_process_backend]} ! tee name=split allow-not-linked=true split. ! queue leaky=downstream max-size-buffers=1 max-size-time=0 max-size-bytes=0 ! videorate drop-only=true ! video/x-raw,format=BGRA,framerate={parameters[frame_rate]}/1 ! gvametaconvert format=json add-empty-results=false ! gvapython class=DetectionFilter function=process module=/home/pipeline-server/gvapython/publisher/detection_filter.py name=detection_filter ! queue leaky=downstream max-size-buffers={parameters[queue_size]} max-size-time=0 max-size-bytes=0 ! videoscale ! video/x-raw,format=BGRA,width=[1,{parameters[frame_width]}],height=[1,{parameters[frame_height]}] ! gvagenai name=captioner generation-config="max_new_tokens={parameters[captioner_max_new_tokens]},num_beams=1,do_sample=false,temperature=0.1,repetition_penalty=1.1" frame-rate={parameters[frame_rate]} metrics=true ! gvametaconvert add-empty-results=true name=metaconvert ! gvapython class=MQTTPublisher function=process module=/home/pipeline-server/gvapython/mqtt_publisher/mqtt_publisher.py name=mqtt_publisher ! fakesink sync=false async=false split. ! queue leaky=downstream max-size-buffers=1 max-size-time=0 max-size-bytes=0 ! appsink name=appsink sync=false

pipelines.pipeline: rtspsrc location={source[uri]} protocols=tcp latency=100 name=source ! rtph264depay wait-for-keyframe=true ! h264parse ! vah264dec ! vapostproc ! video/x-raw(memory:VAMemory) ! queue ! gvadetect name=detection device={parameters[detection_device]} model="/home/pipeline-server/detection_models/{parameters[detection_model_name]}/public/{parameters[detection_model_name]}/FP16/{parameters[detection_model_name]}.xml" threshold={parameters[detection_threshold]} pre-process-backend={parameters[detection_pre_process_backend]} ! tee name=split allow-not-linked=true split. ! queue leaky=downstream max-size-buffers=1 max-size-time=0 max-size-bytes=0 ! videorate drop-only=true ! video/x-raw(memory:VAMemory),framerate={parameters[frame_rate]}/1 ! gvametaconvert format=json add-empty-results=false ! gvapython class=DetectionFilter function=process module=/home/pipeline-server/gvapython/publisher/detection_filter.py name=detection_filter ! queue leaky=downstream max-size-buffers={parameters[queue_size]} max-size-time=0 max-size-bytes=0 ! vapostproc ! video/x-raw,format=BGRA,width=[1,{parameters[frame_width]}],height=[1,{parameters[frame_height]}] ! gvagenai name=captioner generation-config="max_new_tokens={parameters[captioner_max_new_tokens]},num_beams=1,do_sample=false,temperature=0.1,repetition_penalty=1.1" model-cache-path="/tmp/ov_cache" frame-rate={parameters[frame_rate]} metrics=true ! gvametaconvert add-empty-results=true name=metaconvert ! gvapython class=MQTTPublisher function=process module=/home/pipeline-server/gvapython/mqtt_publisher/mqtt_publisher.py name=mqtt_publisher ! fakesink sync=false async=false split. ! queue leaky=downstream max-size-buffers=1 max-size-time=0 max-size-bytes=0 ! appsink name=appsink sync=false
